title: Super Ghost Max Build — Master Plan
mission: Build the strongest AI-driven short-term stock PREDICTION platform current technology reasonably allows: maximize prediction accuracy and minimize false signals, with explainable reasoning, rigorous out-of-sample validation, risk-aware output, and continuous self-improvement. This is decision-support, not an auto-trader.

honesty_boundary.no_guaranteed_profit: The system must never claim or imply guaranteed profit or a fixed accuracy number. 'Sit back and watch money' is reframed as: surface only validated, positive-expectancy-after-cost predictions, prove them forward, and say NO EDGE otherwise.
honesty_boundary.edge_gating: A prediction may only be shown as actionable (grade A/B) when data coverage, calibration, out-of-sample expectancy, and risk/reward all clear their gates. Otherwise it is WATCH or NO EDGE.
honesty_boundary.validation_first: Training accuracy is never trusted. Promotion requires walk-forward + purged-CV + embargo + forward-paper out-of-sample superiority over the live champion.

status_legend.done: Shipped to production and verified live.
status_legend.partial: Some capability exists but does not meet the directive's full bar.
status_legend.planned: Not yet built; specified with an acceptance gate.

phases.name: Foundation (SHIPPED)
phases.gate: Checklist engine + AI brief + regime + truth ledger + accuracy/if-followed endpoints live and tested.

phases.name: Data Coverage Upgrade
phases.gate: WOLF coverage 7/25 -> 18+/25; every tracked symbol >=15/25; no A/B grade unless coverage>=18/25 (ENFORCED: core/super_ghost MIN_COVERAGE_FOR_AB + tests/test_super_ghost_coverage.py). PR88 shipped Alpaca-bars daily history + SEC XBRL fundamentals + the coverage gate.

phases.name: Automated Prediction Logging
phases.gate: 100% of scheduled predictions (pre-open/open/midday/power-hour/close + event-driven) produce ledger rows.

phases.name: Expanded Outcome Resolver
phases.gate: Every prediction has full outcome analytics: target/stop hit time, intraday MFE/MAE, gap & event-window scoring, all horizons (intraday,1,3,5,10,20d).

phases.name: Research & Validation Lab
phases.gate: Walk-forward + purged-CV + embargo + Monte Carlo + replay + slippage/cost sim operational; no model deploys without passing it.

phases.name: Feature Factory (point-in-time)
phases.gate: All feature groups computed point-in-time with leakage tests; feature store serves train + live identically.

phases.name: Model Zoo
phases.gate: GBMs + TFT/PatchTST + DeepLOB + FinBERT/event + Bayesian/regime + graph trained; only OOS-improving models retained; champion/challenger registry live.

phases.name: Ensemble + Meta-Labeler
phases.gate: Stacked ensemble + meta-labeler reduce false-positive rate and improve profit factor vs best single model OOS.

phases.name: Calibration + Self-Correction
phases.gate: Brier/ECE tracked; predicted confidence within tolerance of realized win rate per tier; auto-downgrade of miscalibrated tiers/regimes.

phases.name: Institutional UI
phases.gate: A non-professional understands prediction, risk, and reasoning in <30s; all dashboards live.

phases.name: Production Hardening
phases.gate: Runs unattended without silent failure: monitoring, drift alerts, feed failover, model rollback, analytics DB, security audit.

definition_of_done: A-grade predictions outperform B-grade; B outperform C, out-of-sample.
NO EDGE skips demonstrably avoid bad trades.
Confidence is calibrated (predicted ~= realized per tier).
False-positive rate is low and tracked.
If-followed performance is positive after realistic slippage + costs.
Production runs unattended without silent failure.
Every shown prediction carries probability, risk plan, reasoning, and its own historical accuracy.
